CivicIssue.title: CivicIssue
CivicIssue.description: A reported community issue with location, category, status, and optional multimedia assets

title.description: Short title of the reported civic issue

description.description: Detailed text description of the issue

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to an uploaded photographic proof

audioUrl.description: Optional URL to an uploaded vocal audio description

reporterName.description: Display name of the reporting citizen

reporterEmail.description: Email address of the reporting citizen

latitude.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the issue

longitude.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the issue

address.description: Geocoded street address of the location

upvotes.description: Array of user UIDs who upvoted and verified the issue

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the ticket was generated

statusHistory.description: Chronological history log of status updates

aiAnalysis.description: Optional category and priority explanations generated by Gemini

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A commentary text post made on a specific reported civic issue

issueId.description: ID of the associated civic issue document

userPhotoUrl.description: Optional avatar URL of the user

issues/{issueId}.description: Public repository of reported civic issues

comments/{commentId}.description: Comments attached to reported civic issues
